calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Set For Trial On May-02-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. GOPI K. PANCHAPAKESAN, Esq. and OLIVER ROCOS, Esq. of Bird, Marella, Boxer, Wolpert, Nessim, Drooks, Licenberg & Rhow, P.C. (Tel: 310-201-2100) for plaintiffs (via Zoom videoconference);
Attys. JOSEPH R. FARRIS, Esq. and MICHAEL A. BERTA, Esq. of Arnold & Porter Kaye Scholer LLP (Tel: 415-471-3100) for defendants Mark Govan and Mark Heavey.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MARK GOVAN AND MARK HEAVEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order overruling defendants' demurrer. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/EPS) *****

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. GOPI K. PANCHAPAKESAN, Esq. and OLIVER ROCOS, Esq. of Bird, Marella, Boxer, Wolpert, Nessim, Drooks, Licenberg & Rhow, P.C. (Tel: 310-201-2100) for plaintiffs (via Zoom videoconference);
Attys. JOSEPH R. FARRIS, Esq. and MICHAEL A. BERTA, Esq. of Arnold & Porter Kaye Scholer LLP (Tel: 415-471-3100) for defendants Mark Govan and Mark Heavey.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MARK GOVAN AND MARK HEAVEY's Motion For Sanctions Under Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying defendants' motion for sanctions. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/EPS) *****
